hero.title: Lesson Builder
hero.description: Build structured lesson plans quickly with clear objectives, activities, and review points.

differences.title: Turn teaching ideas into a clear lesson plan
differences.description: Lesson Builder keeps objectives, activities, and review points connected in one practical structure.

items.title: Objective-first planning
items.description: Begin with what learners should understand or accomplish.

items.title: Organized activities
items.description: Arrange teaching and learning activities in a logical sequence.

items.title: Plan review
items.description: Check that the lesson supports its intended objective.

feel.title: A focused path from idea to lesson
feel.description: The workflow helps educators prepare a usable plan without unnecessary complexity.

items.title: Review the plan
items.description: Confirm the lesson is clear and ready to use.

audiences.title: Who uses Lesson Builder
audiences.description: Useful for people preparing structured teaching sessions.

items.title: Teachers
items.description: Prepare classroom lessons around clear objectives.

items.title: Tutors
items.description: Organize focused sessions for individual or group learning.

items.title: Trainers
items.description: Structure workshops and professional learning sessions.

resourceSection.title: Lesson planning essentials
resourceSection.description: Keep the core parts of a lesson plan connected.

items.title: Learning objective
items.description: Define the outcome the lesson should support.

items.title: Activity sequence
items.description: Organize the work learners will complete.

items.title: Lesson review
items.description: Check alignment before using the plan.

groupedSection.title: Build the lesson structure
groupedSection.description: Organize a lesson around preparation, delivery, and review.

items.name: Context
items.description: Clarify the lesson topic and purpose.

items.name: Activities
items.description: Arrange the work that supports the objective.

items.name: Review
items.description: Confirm the plan is ready to use.

technicalSection.title: Built for reusable lesson plans
technicalSection.description: Lesson Builder follows the shared Ansiversa mini-app architecture.

finalCta.title: Ready to build a lesson plan?
